headline: Is Revvity’s (RVTY) China Exit and EPS Reset Quietly Rewriting Its Portfolio Strategy?
summary: Revvity, Inc. reported past first‑quarter 2026 results with sales of US$711.12 million, modestly lower net income of US$40.72 million, and slightly higher diluted earnings per share, while also affirming a quarterly dividend of US$0.07 per share payable in August 2026. Alongside the earnings, Revvity outlined plans to divest its China Immunodiagnostics business, updated its 2026 revenue and adjusted EPS guidance, and adopted a bylaw change allowing 25% shareholders to call special meetings,...
